name: font-to-stl
description: Generate 3D STL files from text using any TTF/OTF font - create individual letters or combined text

scripts.dev: npm run build-web && echo Open http://localhost:3000/web/ in your browser && npx serve . -p 3000
scripts.dev-docs: echo Open http://localhost:3000 in your browser && npx serve docs -p 3000
